<file path="kubernetes/charts/logging/templates/_helpers.tpl">
{{/*
Expand the name of the chart.
*/}}
{{- define "logging.name" -}}
{{- default .Chart.Name .Values.nameOverride | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
{{- end }}

{{/*
Create a default fully qualified app name.
*/}}
{{- define "logging.fullname" -}}
{{- if .Values.fullnameOverride }}
{{- .Values.fullnameOverride | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
{{- else }}
{{- $name := default .Chart.Name .Values.nameOverride }}
{{- if contains $name .Release.Name }}
{{- .Release.Name | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
{{- else }}
{{- printf "%s-%s" .Release.Name $name | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}

{{/*
Create chart name and version as used by the chart label.
*/}}
{{- define "logging.chart" -}}
{{- printf "%s-%s" .Chart.Name .Chart.Version | replace "+" "_" | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
{{- end }}

{{/*
Common labels
*/}}
{{- define "logging.labels" -}}
helm.sh/chart: {{ include "logging.chart" . }}
{{ include "logging.selectorLabels" . }}
{{- if .Chart.AppVersion }}
app.kubernetes.io/version: {{ .Chart.AppVersion | quote }}
{{- end }}
app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: {{ .Release.Service }}
{{- end }}

{{/*
Selector labels
*/}}
{{- define "logging.selectorLabels" -}}
app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ include "logging.name" . }}
app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ .Release.Name }}
{{- end }}

{{/*
Create the name of the service account to use
*/}}
{{- define "logging.serviceAccountName" -}}
{{- if .Values.serviceAccount.create }}
{{- default (include "logging.fullname" .) .Values.serviceAccount.name }}
{{- else }}
{{- default "default" .Values.serviceAccount.name }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}

{{/*
Generate initial master nodes list for Elasticsearch cluster.
Produces "elasticsearch-0,elasticsearch-1,elasticsearch-2" for replicaCount=3.
*/}}
{{- define "elasticsearch.initialMasterNodes" -}}
{{- $nodes := list -}}
{{- range $i := until (int .Values.elasticsearch.replicaCount) -}}
{{- $nodes = append $nodes (printf "elasticsearch-%d" $i) -}}
{{- end -}}
{{- join "," $nodes -}}
{{- end -}}
</file>

<file path="kubernetes/charts/logging/templates/ingress.yaml">
{{- if .Values.ingress.enabled }}
{{- if not .Values.authentik.enabled }}
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: logging
  namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
  labels:
    app: logging
  annotations:
    {{- if .Values.ingress.tls.enabled }}
    cert-manager.io/cluster-issuer: letsencrypt
    {{- end }}
    traefik.ingress.kubernetes.io/router.entrypoints: web,websecure
    {{- if .Values.authentik.enabled }}
    traefik.ingress.kubernetes.io/router.middlewares: {{ .Values.authentik.middleware | default "service-authentik-forward-auth@kubernetescrd" }}
    {{- end }}
    {{- with .Values.ingress.annotations }}
    {{- toYaml . | nindent 4 }}
    {{- end }}
spec:
  ingressClassName: {{ .Values.ingress.className }}
  rules:
    {{- if .Values.kibana.enabled }}
    - host: {{ .Values.ingress.hosts.kibana.host }}
      http:
        paths:
          - path: {{ .Values.ingress.hosts.kibana.path }}
            pathType: Prefix
            backend:
              service:
                name: kibana
                port:
                  number: {{ .Values.kibana.service.port }}
    {{- end }}
  {{- if .Values.ingress.tls.enabled }}
  tls:
    - hosts:
        {{- if .Values.kibana.enabled }}
        - {{ .Values.ingress.hosts.kibana.host }}
        {{- end }}
      secretName: {{ .Values.ingress.tls.secretName }}
  {{- end }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}
</file>

<file path="kubernetes/charts/logging/templates/networkpolicy.yaml">
{{- if .Values.networkPolicy.enabled -}}
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: {{ include "logging.fullname" . }}
  labels:
    {{- include "logging.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      {{- include "logging.selectorLabels" . | nindent 6 }}
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress

  ingress:
    # Allow ingress from Traefik to Kibana
    - from:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              name: ingress
          podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/name: traefik
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: {{ .Values.kibana.service.port }}
        - protocol: TCP
          port: {{ .Values.elasticsearch.service.httpPort }}
        - protocol: TCP
          port: {{ .Values.logstash.service.beatsPort }}

    # Allow ingress from same namespace
    - from:
        - podSelector: {}

    {{- with .Values.networkPolicy.ingress }}
    {{- toYaml . | nindent 4 }}
    {{- end }}

  egress:
    # Allow DNS
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              name: kube-system
      ports:
        - protocol: UDP
          port: 53

    # Allow HTTPS to external
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector: {}
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 443

    # Allow HTTP to external
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector: {}
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 80

    # Allow database connections
    {{- if .Values.networkPolicy.egressRules.allowDatabases }}
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              name: db
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 5432  # PostgreSQL
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 27017  # MongoDB
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 6379  # Valkey/Redis
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 9000  # MinIO
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8123  # ClickHouse
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 3306  # MySQL
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 5672  # RabbitMQ
    {{- end }}

    # Allow service mesh (Consul)
    {{- if .Values.networkPolicy.egressRules.allowConsul }}
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              name: service
          podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/name: consul
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8500
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8600
    {{- end }}

    # Allow Vault
    {{- if .Values.networkPolicy.egressRules.allowVault }}
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              name: service
          podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/name: vault
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8200
    {{- end }}

    # Allow Authentik
    {{- if .Values.networkPolicy.egressRules.allowAuthentik }}
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              name: service
          podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/name: authentik
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 9000
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 9443
    {{- end }}

    {{- with .Values.networkPolicy.egress }}
    {{- toYaml . | nindent 4 }}
    {{- end }}
{{- end }}
</file>

<file path="kubernetes/charts/metube/templates/deployment.yaml">
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{ include "metube.fullname" . }}
  namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
  labels:
    {{- include "metube.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
spec:
  replicas: {{ .Values.replicaCount }}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      {{- include "metube.selectorLabels" . | nindent 6 }}
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        {{- include "metube.selectorLabels" . | nindent 8 }}
      annotations:
        {{- if .Values.consul.enabled }}
        consul.hashicorp.com/connect-inject: "true"
        consul.hashicorp.com/connect-service: {{ include "metube.fullname" . }}
        consul.hashicorp.com/connect-service-port: "{{ .Values.service.targetPort }}"
        consul.hashicorp.com/service-tags: "{{ join "," .Values.consul.tags }}"
        {{- end }}
        # ELK Filebeat logging
        co.elastic.logs/enabled: "true"
        co.elastic.logs.json.keys_under_root: "true"
        co.elastic.logs.json.add_error_key: "true"
        # Prometheus metrics
        prometheus.io/scrape: "true"
        prometheus.io/port: "{{ .Values.service.targetPort }}"
        prometheus.io/path: "/metrics"
    spec:
      securityContext:
        {{- toYaml .Values.securityContext | nindent 8 }}

      containers:
        - name: {{ .Chart.Name }}
          image: "{{ .Values.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.image.tag }}"
          imagePullPolicy: {{ .Values.image.pullPolicy }}

          ports:
            - containerPort: {{ .Values.service.targetPort }}
              name: http

          env:
            - name: OUTPUT_TEMPLATE
              value: {{ .Values.metube.outputTemplate | quote }}
            - name: DEFAULT_RES
              value: {{ .Values.metube.defaultRes | quote }}
            - name: DARK_MODE
              value: {{ .Values.metube.darkMode | quote }}

          resources:
            {{- toYaml .Values.resources | nindent 12 }}

          {{- if .Values.persistence.enabled }}
          volumeMounts:
            - name: downloads
              mountPath: {{ .Values.persistence.mountPath }}
          {{- end }}

          {{- if .Values.probes.liveness.enabled }}
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: {{ .Values.probes.liveness.path }}
              port: {{ .Values.service.targetPort }}
            initialDelaySeconds: {{ .Values.probes.liveness.initialDelaySeconds }}
            periodSeconds: {{ .Values.probes.liveness.periodSeconds }}
          {{- end }}

          {{- if .Values.probes.readiness.enabled }}
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: {{ .Values.probes.readiness.path }}
              port: {{ .Values.service.targetPort }}
            initialDelaySeconds: {{ .Values.probes.readiness.initialDelaySeconds }}
            periodSeconds: {{ .Values.probes.readiness.periodSeconds }}
          {{- end }}

      {{- if .Values.persistence.enabled }}
      volumes:
        - name: downloads
          persistentVolumeClaim:
            claimName: {{ include "metube.fullname" . }}-downloads
      {{- end }}

      {{- with .Values.nodeSelector }}
      nodeSelector:
        {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
      {{- end }}
      {{- with .Values.affinity }}
      affinity:
        {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
      {{- end }}
      {{- with .Values.tolerations }}
      tolerations:
        {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
      {{- end }}
</file>

<file path="kubernetes/charts/metube/templates/ingress.yaml">
{{- if .Values.ingress.enabled }}
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: {{ include "metube.fullname" . }}
  namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
  labels:
    {{- include "metube.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
  annotations:
    {{- if .Values.ingress.tls.enabled }}
    cert-manager.io/cluster-issuer: {{ .Values.ingress.tls.clusterIssuer | default "letsencrypt" | quote }}
    {{- end }}
    traefik.ingress.kubernetes.io/router.entrypoints: web,websecure
    {{- if .Values.authentik.enabled }}
    traefik.ingress.kubernetes.io/router.middlewares: {{ .Values.authentik.middleware | default "service-authentik-forward-auth@kubernetescrd" }}
    {{- end }}
    {{- with .Values.ingress.annotations }}
    {{- toYaml . | nindent 4 }}
    {{- end }}
spec:
  ingressClassName: {{ .Values.ingress.className }}
  rules:
    - host: {{ .Values.ingress.host }}
      http:
        paths:
          - path: /
            pathType: Prefix
            backend:
              service:
                name: {{ include "metube.fullname" . }}
                port:
                  number: {{ .Values.service.port }}
  {{- if .Values.ingress.tls.enabled }}
  tls:
    - hosts:
        - {{ .Values.ingress.host }}
      secretName: {{ .Values.ingress.tls.secretName }}
  {{- end }}
{{- end }}
</file>

<file path="kubernetes/charts/metube/templates/networkpolicy.yaml">
{{- if .Values.networkPolicy.enabled -}}
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: {{ include "metube.fullname" . }}
  labels:
    {{- include "metube.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      {{- include "metube.selectorLabels" . | nindent 6 }}
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress

  ingress:
    # Allow ingress from Traefik
    - from:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              name: ingress
          podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/name: traefik
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: {{ .Values.service.port }}

    # Allow ingress from same namespace
    - from:
        - podSelector: {}

    {{- with .Values.networkPolicy.ingress }}
    {{- toYaml . | nindent 4 }}
    {{- end }}

  egress:
    # Allow DNS
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              name: kube-system
      ports:
        - protocol: UDP
          port: 53

    # Allow HTTPS to external
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector: {}
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 443

    # Allow HTTP to external
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector: {}
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 80

    # Allow database connections
    {{- if .Values.networkPolicy.egressRules.allowDatabases }}
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              name: db
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 5432  # PostgreSQL
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 27017  # MongoDB
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 6379  # Valkey/Redis
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 9000  # MinIO
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8123  # ClickHouse
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 3306  # MySQL
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 5672  # RabbitMQ
    {{- end }}

    # Allow service mesh (Consul)
    {{- if .Values.networkPolicy.egressRules.allowConsul }}
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              name: service
          podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/name: consul
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8500
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8600
    {{- end }}

    # Allow Vault
    {{- if .Values.networkPolicy.egressRules.allowVault }}
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              name: service
          podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/name: vault
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8200
    {{- end }}

    # Allow Authentik
    {{- if .Values.networkPolicy.egressRules.allowAuthentik }}
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              name: service
          podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/name: authentik
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 9000
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 9443
    {{- end }}

    {{- with .Values.networkPolicy.egress }}
    {{- toYaml . | nindent 4 }}
    {{- end }}
{{- end }}
</file>

<file path="kubernetes/charts/monitoring/templates/grafana/dashboards-configmap.yaml">
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: grafana-dashboards-db
  namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
  labels:
    grafana_dashboard: "1"
data:
  # PostgreSQL Dashboard Configuration
  postgresql-dashboard.json: |
    {
      "dashboard": {
        "title": "PostgreSQL Database Metrics",
        "tags": ["postgresql", "database"],
        "timezone": "browser",
        "panels": [
          {
            "title": "Database Connections",
            "targets": [
              {
                "expr": "pg_stat_database_numbackends{datname!='template0',datname!='template1'}",
                "legendFormat": "{{ "{{datname}}" }}"
              }
            ],
            "type": "graph"
          },
          {
            "title": "Transaction Rate",
            "targets": [
              {
                "expr": "rate(pg_stat_database_xact_commit{datname!='template0',datname!='template1'}[5m])",
                "legendFormat": "{{ "{{datname}} commits" }}"
              },
              {
                "expr": "rate(pg_stat_database_xact_rollback{datname!='template0',datname!='template1'}[5m])",
                "legendFormat": "{{ "{{datname}} rollbacks" }}"
              }
            ],
            "type": "graph"
          },
          {
            "title": "Database Size",
            "targets": [
              {
                "expr": "pg_database_size_bytes{datname!='template0',datname!='template1'}",
                "legendFormat": "{{ "{{datname}}" }}"
              }
            ],
            "type": "graph"
          },
          {
            "title": "Replication Lag",
            "targets": [
              {
                "expr": "pg_replication_lag",
                "legendFormat": "{{ "{{instance}}" }}"
              }
            ],
            "type": "graph"
          }
        ]
      }
    }

  # MongoDB Dashboard Configuration

        "title": "Valkey/Redis Cache Metrics",
        "tags": ["valkey", "redis", "cache"],
        "timezone": "browser",
        "panels": [
          {
            "title": "Commands per Second",
            "targets": [

                "expr": "rate(redis_commands_processed_total[5m])",
                "legendFormat": "{{ "{{instance}}" }}"
              }
            ],
            "type": "graph"
          },

            "title": "Memory Usage",
            "targets": [
              {
                "expr": "redis_memory_used_bytes",

              },
              {
                "expr": "redis_memory_max_bytes",
                "legendFormat": "{{ "Max - {{instance}}" }}"
              }
            ],
            "type": "graph"
          },
          {
            "title": "Hit Rate",
            "targets": [
              {
                "expr": "rate(redis_keyspace_hits_total[5m]) / (rate(redis_keyspace_hits_total[5m]) + rate(redis_keyspace_misses_total[5m]))",
                "legendFormat": "{{ "{{instance}}" }}"
              }
            ],
            "type": "graph"
          },
          {
            "title": "Connected Clients",
            "targets": [
              {
                "expr": "redis_connected_clients",
                "legendFormat": "{{ "{{instance}}" }}"
              }
            ],
            "type": "graph"
          },
          {
            "title": "Replication Lag",
            "targets": [
              {
                "expr": "redis_master_repl_offset - on(instance) group_right redis_slave_repl_offset",
                "legendFormat": "{{ "{{instance}}" }}"
              }
            ],
            "type": "graph"
          }
        ]
      }
    }

  # Bytebase Dashboard Configuration

# Dashboard provider configuration
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: grafana-dashboard-provider
  namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
data:
  dashboards.yaml: |
    apiVersion: 1
    providers:
      - name: 'Database Dashboards'
        orgId: 1
        folder: 'Databases'
        type: file
        disableDeletion: false
        updateIntervalSeconds: 10
        allowUiUpdates: true
        options:
          path: /var/lib/grafana/dashboards/db
</file>

  namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}

    - ReadWriteOnce

<file path="kubernetes/charts/monitoring/templates/loki/configmap.yaml">
{{- if .Values.loki.enabled }}
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: loki-config
  namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
data:
  loki-config.yaml: |
    auth_enabled: false

    ingester:
      chunk_idle_period: 3m
      chunk_retain_period: 1m
      max_chunk_age: {{ .Values.loki.max_chunk_age }}
      chunk_encoding: snappy
      lifecycler:
        ring:
          kvstore:
            store: inmemory
          replication_factor: 1

    limits_config:
      enforce_metric_name: false
      reject_old_samples: true
      reject_old_samples_max_age: 168h
      ingestion_rate_mb: 32
      ingestion_burst_size_mb: 64
      retention_period: {{ .Values.loki.retention_period }}

    schema_config:
      configs:
        - from: 2020-10-24
          store: boltdb-shipper
          object_store: filesystem
          schema: v11
          index:
            prefix: index_
            period: 24h

    server:
      http_listen_port: 3100
      log_level: info

    storage_config:
      boltdb_shipper:
        active_index_directory: /loki/boltdb-shipper-active
        cache_location: /loki/boltdb-shipper-cache
      filesystem:
        directory: /loki/chunks
{{- end }}
</file>

<file path="kubernetes/charts/monitoring/templates/promtail/configmap.yaml">
{{- if .Values.promtail.enabled }}
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: promtail-config
  namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
data:
  config.yaml: |
    clients:
      - url: http://loki:3100/loki/api/v1/push

    positions:
      filename: /tmp/positions.yaml

    scrape_configs:
      - job_name: kubernetes-pods
        kubernetes_sd_configs:
          - role: pod
        relabel_configs:
          - source_labels: [__meta_kubernetes_pod_label_app]
            target_label: app
          - source_labels: [__meta_kubernetes_pod_name]
            target_label: pod
          - source_labels: [__meta_kubernetes_namespace]
            target_label: namespace
          - action: drop
            regex: ''
            source_labels: [__service__]
          - action: replace
            regex: ([^:]+)(?::\d+)?;(\d+)
            replacement: $1:$2
            source_labels:
              - __meta_kubernetes_pod_node_name
              - __meta_kubernetes_pod_container_port_number
            target_label: __address__
          - action: replace
            source_labels:
              - __meta_kubernetes_pod_node_name
            target_label: __host__
          - action: drop
            regex: Succeeded|Failed
            source_labels:
              - __meta_kubernetes_pod_phase

      - job_name: docker
        static_configs:
          - targets:
              - stdout
            labels:
              job: varlogs
              __path__: /var/log/*log
{{- end }}
</file>

<file path="kubernetes/charts/monitoring/templates/networkpolicy.yaml">
{{- if .Values.networkPolicy.enabled -}}
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: {{ include "monitoring.fullname" . }}
  labels:
    {{- include "monitoring.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      {{- include "monitoring.selectorLabels" . | nindent 6 }}
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress

  ingress:
    # Allow ingress from Traefik to all monitoring services
    - from:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              name: ingress
          podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/name: traefik
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: {{ .Values.grafana.service.port }}
        - protocol: TCP
          port: {{ .Values.prometheus.service.port }}
        - protocol: TCP
          port: {{ .Values.loki.service.port }}

    # Allow ingress from same namespace (for internal communication)
    - from:
        - podSelector: {}

    {{- with .Values.networkPolicy.ingress }}
    {{- toYaml . | nindent 4 }}
    {{- end }}

  egress:
    # Allow DNS
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              name: kube-system
      ports:
        - protocol: UDP
          port: 53

    # Allow HTTPS to external
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector: {}
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 443

    # Allow HTTP to external
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector: {}
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 80

    # Allow database connections
    {{- if .Values.networkPolicy.egressRules.allowDatabases }}
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              name: db
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 5432  # PostgreSQL
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 27017  # MongoDB
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 6379  # Valkey/Redis
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 9000  # MinIO
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8123  # ClickHouse
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 3306  # MySQL
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 5672  # RabbitMQ
    {{- end }}

    # Allow service mesh (Consul)
    {{- if .Values.networkPolicy.egressRules.allowConsul }}
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              name: service
          podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/name: consul
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8500
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8600
    {{- end }}

    # Allow Vault
    {{- if .Values.networkPolicy.egressRules.allowVault }}
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              name: service
          podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/name: vault
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8200
    {{- end }}

    # Allow Authentik
    {{- if .Values.networkPolicy.egressRules.allowAuthentik }}
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              name: service
          podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/name: authentik
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 9000
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 9443
    {{- end }}

    {{- with .Values.networkPolicy.egress }}
    {{- toYaml . | nindent 4 }}
    {{- end }}
{{- end }}
</file>

<file path="kubernetes/charts/monitoring/templates/serviceaccounts-rbac.yaml">
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: prometheus
  namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: promtail
  namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRole
metadata:
  name: prometheus
rules:
  - apiGroups: [""]
    resources:
      - nodes
      - nodes/proxy
      - services
      - endpoints
      - pods
    verbs: ["get", "list", "watch"]
  - apiGroups: ["extensions"]
    resources:
      - ingresses
    verbs: ["get", "list", "watch"]
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRoleBinding
metadata:
  name: prometheus
roleRef:
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
  kind: ClusterRole
  name: prometheus
subjects:
  - kind: ServiceAccount
    name: prometheus
    namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRole
metadata:
  name: promtail
rules:
  - apiGroups: [""]
    resources:
      - pods
    verbs: ["get", "list", "watch"]
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRoleBinding
metadata:
  name: promtail
roleRef:
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
  kind: ClusterRole
  name: promtail
subjects:
  - kind: ServiceAccount
    name: promtail
    namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
</file>

<file path="kubernetes/charts/monitoring/Chart.yaml">
apiVersion: v2
name: monitoring
description: A Helm chart for Grafana, Prometheus, and Loki monitoring stack
type: application
version: 1.0.0
appVersion: "latest"
home: https://grafana.com
sources:
  - https://github.com/grafana/grafana
  - https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus
  - https://github.com/grafana/loki
maintainers:
  - name: DevOps Team
</file>

<file path="kubernetes/charts/n8n/templates/_helpers.tpl">
{{/*
Expand the name of the chart.
*/}}
{{- define "n8n.name" -}}
{{- default .Chart.Name .Values.nameOverride | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
{{- end }}

{{/*
Create a default fully qualified app name.
*/}}
{{- define "n8n.fullname" -}}
{{- if .Values.fullnameOverride }}
{{- .Values.fullnameOverride | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
{{- else }}
{{- $name := default .Chart.Name .Values.nameOverride }}
{{- if contains $name .Release.Name }}
{{- .Release.Name | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
{{- else }}
{{- printf "%s-%s" .Release.Name $name | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}

{{/*
Create chart name and version as used by the chart label.
*/}}
{{- define "n8n.chart" -}}
{{- printf "%s-%s" .Chart.Name .Chart.Version | replace "+" "_" | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
{{- end }}

{{/*
Common labels
*/}}
{{- define "n8n.labels" -}}
helm.sh/chart: {{ include "n8n.chart" . }}
{{ include "n8n.selectorLabels" . }}
{{- if .Chart.AppVersion }}
app.kubernetes.io/version: {{ .Chart.AppVersion | quote }}
{{- end }}
app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: {{ .Release.Service }}
{{- end }}

{{/*
Selector labels
*/}}
{{- define "n8n.selectorLabels" -}}
app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ include "n8n.name" . }}
app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ .Release.Name }}
{{- end }}

{{/*
Create the name of the service account to use
*/}}
{{- define "n8n.serviceAccountName" -}}
{{- if .Values.serviceAccount.create }}
{{- default (include "n8n.fullname" .) .Values.serviceAccount.name }}
{{- else }}
{{- default "default" .Values.serviceAccount.name }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}
</file>

<file path="kubernetes/charts/n8n/values.yaml">
namespace: automation

image:
  repository: n8nio/n8n
  tag: "1.70.0"
  pullPolicy: IfNotPresent

replicaCount: 1

service:
  type: ClusterIP
  port: 5678

resources:
  requests:
    cpu: 100m
    memory: 256Mi
  limits:
    cpu: 1000m
    memory: 1Gi

persistence:
  enabled: true
  storageClass: local-path
  size: 5Gi

# Database
database:
  type: postgresdb
  host: postgresql.db.svc.cluster.local
  port: 5432
  database: n8n
  user: n8n
  password: ""  # Injected via Vault - see vault.hashicorp.com annotations

# Redis/Valkey for queue
redis:
  enabled: true
  host: valkey-primary.db.svc.cluster.local
  port: 6379

# n8n configuration
config:
  executions:
    mode: queue
  generic:
    timezone: Europe/Moscow

ingress:
  enabled: true
  className: traefik
  host: n8n.zeizel.ru
  annotations:
    traefik.ingress.kubernetes.io/router.entrypoints: websecure
    traefik.ingress.kubernetes.io/router.tls: "true"

serviceAccount:
  create: true
  name: n8n
  automountServiceAccountToken: false
  annotations: {}

# RBAC
rbac:
  create: true
  rules: []

# Network Policy
networkPolicy:
  enabled: true
  egressRules:
    allowDatabases: true
    allowConsul: true
    allowVault: true
    allowAuthentik: false
  ingress: []
  egress: []

# Metrics
metrics:
  enabled: true
  port: "http"
  path: "/metrics"
  interval: "30s"
  scrapeTimeout: "10s"

# Security Context
securityContext:
  runAsNonRoot: true
  runAsUser: 1000
  runAsGroup: 1000
  fsGroup: 1000
  seccompProfile:
    type: RuntimeDefault

containerSecurityContext:
  allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
  readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
  capabilities:
    drop:
      - ALL

# Vault integration
vault:
  enabled: false
  # Note: Before enabling, configure Vault:
  # 1. Create policy for n8n service
  # 2. Create secret at secret/data/n8n/secrets
  # 3. Enable Kubernetes auth method in Vault
  # 4. Create role binding ServiceAccount to Vault policy
</file>

<file path="kubernetes/charts/namespaces/templates/tests/test-connection.yaml">
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:

  labels:
    {{- include "namespaces.labels" . | nindent 4 }}

    "helm.sh/hook": test
    "helm.sh/hook-delete-policy": before-hook-creation,hook-succeeded

<file path="kubernetes/charts/namespaces/templates/_helpers.tpl">
{{/*
Expand the name of the chart.
*/}}
{{- define "namespaces.name" -}}
{{- default .Chart.Name .Values.nameOverride | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
{{- end }}

{{/*
Create a default fully qualified app name.
*/}}

{{- if .Values.fullnameOverride }}
{{- .Values.fullnameOverride | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
{{- else }}
{{- $name := default .Chart.Name .Values.nameOverride }}
{{- if contains $name .Release.Name }}
{{- .Release.Name | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
{{- else }}
{{- printf "%s-%s" .Release.Name $name | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}

{{/*
Create chart name and version as used by the chart label.
*/}}
{{- define "namespaces.chart" -}}
{{- printf "%s-%s" .Chart.Name .Chart.Version | replace "+" "_" | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}

{{/*
Common labels for all namespaces
*/}}

app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ .Release.Name }}
app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: {{ .Release.Service }}
app.kubernetes.io/version: {{ .Chart.AppVersion | quote }}
{{- end }}

{{/*
Create namespace metadata labels
*/}}
{{- define "namespaces.namespace.labels" -}}
{{ toYaml .Values.globalLabels }}
{{- with .Values.namespaceLabels }}
{{ toYaml . }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}

{{/*
Selector labels
*/}}
{{- define "namespaces.selectorLabels" -}}
app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ include "namespaces.name" . }}
app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ .Release.Name }}
{{- end }}

{{/*
Create the name of the service account to use
*/}}
{{- define "namespaces.serviceAccountName" -}}
{{- if .Values.serviceAccount.create }}
{{- default (include "namespaces.fullname" .) .Values.serviceAccount.name }}
{{- else }}
{{- default "default" .Values.serviceAccount.name }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}
</file>

<file path="kubernetes/charts/namespaces/templates/networkpolicy.yaml">
{{/*
The namespaces chart creates namespaces, ClusterIssuers, and namespace-level policies.
It does not deploy pods that need network policies, so this file is empty.
Each namespace created by this chart will have its own network policies
managed by the services deployed into those namespaces.
*/}}
</file>

<file path="kubernetes/charts/namespaces/README.md">
# Namespaces Chart

Production-ready Helm chart for creating and managing Kubernetes namespaces with proper Helm ownership annotations.

## Installation

```bash
helm install namespaces ./charts/namespaces
--namespace default
--create-namespace
```

## Features

- ✅ Proper Helm ownership annotations (`meta.helm.sh/*`)
- ✅ Standard Kubernetes labels (`app.kubernetes.io/*`)
- ✅ Namespace descriptions and documentation
- ✅ Global and namespace-specific labels
- ✅ Easy enable/disable per namespace
- ✅ Timestamp tracking
- ✅ Compatible with helmfile

## Namespaces Created

- **ingress**: Traefik, Ingress Controllers
- **service**: Consul, Vault, Authentik, Monitoring
- **db**: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, MinIO
- **productivity**: Notesnook, Excalidraw
- **code**: GitLab, YouTrack, TeamCity, Hub
- **social**: Stoat, Stalwart Mail
- **data**: Vaultwarden, Syncthing, Nextcloud
- **auth**: Authentication services
- **monitoring**: Prometheus, Grafana, Loki

## Usage

### Customize values

Override namespaces to create

```YAML
namespaces:
  ingress:
    enabled: true
  service:
    enabled: true
  db:
    enabled: true

# ... other namespaces
```

## Verification

Check namespaces created

```bash
kubectl get namespaces --show-labels
```

Check Helm annotations

```bash
kubectl get namespace ingress -o yaml
```

Check all namespaces managed by this release

```bash
helm list -A | grep namespaces
```

## Cleanup

Delete all namespaces managed by this chart

```bash
helm uninstall namespaces -n default
```

Or with helmfile

```bash
helmfile -e k8s -l name=namespaces destroy
```
</file>

<file path="kubernetes/charts/openclaw/values.yaml">
namespace: automation

create:
  namespace: true

# OpenClaw Image
image:
  repository: alpine/openclaw
  tag: "1.0.0"
  pullPolicy: IfNotPresent

# OpenClaw Server configuration
openclaw:
  replicaCount: 1

  service:
    type: ClusterIP
    port: 18789
    oauthPort: 1455

  # Gateway token (set via Vault)
  # gatewayToken: ""

  # Extra apt packages to install during build
  extraAptPackages: ""

  # Extra host bind mounts
  extraMounts: ""

# Resources
resources:
  limits:
    cpu: 2000m
    memory: 4Gi
  requests:
    cpu: 500m
    memory: 1Gi

# Persistence
persistence:
  config:
    enabled: true
    storageClass: local-path
    accessMode: ReadWriteOnce
    size: 10Gi
    mountPath: /home/node/.openclaw

  workspace:
    enabled: true
    storageClass: local-path
    accessMode: ReadWriteOnce
    size: 50Gi
    mountPath: /workspace

# Ingress
ingress:
  enabled: true
  className: traefik
  host: openclaw.localhost
  annotations: {}
  tls:
    enabled: true
    secretName: openclaw-tls

# Security Context
securityContext:
  runAsUser: 1000
  runAsGroup: 1000
  fsGroup: 1000

podSecurityContext:
  runAsNonRoot: true
  runAsUser: 1000
  fsGroup: 1000
  seccompProfile:
    type: RuntimeDefault

containerSecurityContext:
  allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
  readOnlyRootFilesystem: false  # OpenClaw needs writable filesystem
  capabilities:
    drop: [ALL]

# Probes
probes:
  liveness:
    enabled: true
    path: /health
    port: 18789
    initialDelaySeconds: 60
    periodSeconds: 30
    timeoutSeconds: 10
  readiness:
    enabled: true
    path: /health
    port: 18789
    initialDelaySeconds: 30
    periodSeconds: 10
    timeoutSeconds: 5
  startup:
    enabled: true
    path: /health
    port: 18789
    initialDelaySeconds: 10
    periodSeconds: 10
    failureThreshold: 30

# Consul integration
consul:
  enabled: true
  tags:
    - openclaw
    - ai-assistant
    - automation

# Authentik integration (ForwardAuth via Traefik)
authentik:
  enabled: false
  middleware: "service-authentik-forward-auth@kubernetescrd"
  host: "https://authentik.local"
  outpostPath: "/outpost.goauthentik.io/auth/traefik"

# Vault integration
vault:
  enabled: false
  role: "openclaw"
  secretPath: "secret/data/openclaw/secrets"
  # Secrets to inject:
  # - ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
  # - OPENAI_API_KEY
  # - GATEWAY_TOKEN

# Network Policy
networkPolicy:
  enabled: true
  egressRules:
    allowDatabases: false
    allowConsul: true
    allowVault: true
    allowAuthentik: false
    allowExternalHTTPS: true  # Required for LLM API calls
  ingress: []
  egress: []

# Service Account
serviceAccount:
  create: true
  automountServiceAccountToken: false
  annotations: {}
  name: ""

# RBAC
rbac:
  create: true
  allowSecrets: false
  rules: []

# Metrics
metrics:
  enabled: true
  port: "metrics"
  path: "/metrics"
  interval: "30s"
  scrapeTimeout: "10s"

# Pod Disruption Budget
podDisruptionBudget:
  enabled: false
  minAvailable: 1
  # maxUnavailable: 1
</file>

{{/*
Expand the name of the chart.
*/}}
{{- define "pangolin.name" -}}
{{- default .Chart.Name .Values.nameOverride | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
{{- end }}

Create a default fully qualified app name.
*/}}

{{- if .Values.fullnameOverride }}
{{- .Values.fullnameOverride | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
{{- else }}
{{- $name := default .Chart.Name .Values.nameOverride }}
{{- if contains $name .Release.Name }}
{{- .Release.Name | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
{{- else }}
{{- printf "%s-%s" .Release.Name $name | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}

{{/*
Create chart name and version as used by the chart label.
*/}}
{{- define "pangolin.chart" -}}
{{- printf "%s-%s" .Chart.Name .Chart.Version | replace "+" "_" | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
{{- end }}

{{/*
Common labels
*/}}
{{- define "pangolin.labels" -}}
helm.sh/chart: {{ include "pangolin.chart" . }}
{{ include "pangolin.selectorLabels" . }}
{{- if .Chart.AppVersion }}
app.kubernetes.io/version: {{ .Chart.AppVersion | quote }}
{{- end }}
app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: {{ .Release.Service }}
{{- end }}

Selector labels
*/}}

app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ .Release.Name }}
{{- end }}

Create the name of the service account to use
*/}}

{{- if .Values.serviceAccount.create }}
{{- default (include "pangolin.fullname" .) .Values.serviceAccount.name }}
{{- else }}
{{- default "default" .Values.serviceAccount.name }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}

<file path="kubernetes/charts/pangolin/templates/networkpolicy.yaml">
{{- if .Values.networkPolicy.enabled -}}
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: {{ include "pangolin.fullname" . }}
  labels:
    {{- include "pangolin.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      {{- include "pangolin.selectorLabels" . | nindent 6 }}
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress

  ingress:
    # Allow ingress from Traefik
    - from:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              name: ingress
          podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/name: traefik
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: {{ .Values.service.port }}

    # Allow ingress from same namespace
    - from:
        - podSelector: {}

    {{- with .Values.networkPolicy.ingress }}
    {{- toYaml . | nindent 4 }}
    {{- end }}

  egress:
    # Allow DNS
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              name: kube-system
      ports:
        - protocol: UDP
          port: 53

    # Allow HTTPS to external
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector: {}
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 443

    # Allow HTTP to external
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector: {}
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 80

    # Allow database connections
    {{- if .Values.networkPolicy.egressRules.allowDatabases }}
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              name: db
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 5432  # PostgreSQL
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 27017  # MongoDB
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 6379  # Valkey/Redis
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 9000  # MinIO
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8123  # ClickHouse
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 3306  # MySQL
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 5672  # RabbitMQ
    {{- end }}

    # Allow service mesh (Consul)
    {{- if .Values.networkPolicy.egressRules.allowConsul }}
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              name: service
          podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/name: consul
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8500
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8600
    {{- end }}

    # Allow Vault
    {{- if .Values.networkPolicy.egressRules.allowVault }}
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              name: service
          podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/name: vault
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8200
    {{- end }}

    # Allow Authentik
    {{- if .Values.networkPolicy.egressRules.allowAuthentik }}
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              name: service
          podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/name: authentik
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 9000
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 9443
    {{- end }}

    {{- with .Values.networkPolicy.egress }}
    {{- toYaml . | nindent 4 }}
    {{- end }}
{{- end }}
</file>

<file path="kubernetes/charts/remnawave/templates/deployment.yaml">
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{ include "remnawave.fullname" . }}
  labels:
    {{- include "remnawave.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
spec:
  replicas: {{ .Values.replicaCount }}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      {{- include "remnawave.selectorLabels" . | nindent 6 }}
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        checksum/config: {{ include (print $.Template.BasePath "/configmap.yaml") . | sha256sum }}
        checksum/secret: {{ include (print $.Template.BasePath "/secret.yaml") . | sha256sum }}
        {{- if .Values.consul.enabled }}
        consul.hashicorp.com/connect-inject: "true"
        consul.hashicorp.com/connect-service: {{ include "remnawave.fullname" . }}
        consul.hashicorp.com/connect-service-port: "{{ .Values.service.targetPort }}"
        consul.hashicorp.com/service-tags: "{{ join "," .Values.consul.tags }}"
        {{- end }}
        co.elastic.logs/enabled: "true"
        co.elastic.logs.json.keys_under_root: "true"
        co.elastic.logs.json.add_error_key: "true"
        co.elastic.logs.json.message_key: "message"
        prometheus.io/scrape: "true"
        prometheus.io/port: "{{ .Values.service.targetPort }}"
        prometheus.io/path: "/metrics"
        {{- with .Values.podAnnotations }}
        {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
        {{- end }}
      labels:
        {{- include "remnawave.selectorLabels" . | nindent 8 }}
    spec:
      {{- with .Values.imagePullSecrets }}
      imagePullSecrets:
        {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
      {{- end }}
      serviceAccountName: {{ include "remnawave.serviceAccountName" . }}
      securityContext:
        {{- toYaml .Values.podSecurityContext | nindent 8 }}
      initContainers:
      - name: wait-for-postgres
        image: postgres:17-alpine
        command:
          - sh
          - -c
          - |
            echo "Waiting for PostgreSQL to be ready..."
            until pg_isready -h {{ .Values.postgresql.external.host }} -p {{ .Values.postgresql.external.port }}; do
              echo "PostgreSQL is not ready yet..."
              sleep 2
            done
            echo "PostgreSQL is ready!"
      - name: wait-for-redis
        image: busybox:1.36
        command:
          - sh
          - -c
          - |
            echo "Waiting for Redis/ValKey to be ready..."
            until nc -z {{ .Values.redis.external.host }} {{ .Values.redis.external.port }}; do
              echo "Redis/ValKey is not ready yet..."
              sleep 2
            done
            echo "Redis/ValKey is ready!"
      containers:
      - name: {{ .Chart.Name }}
        securityContext:
          {{- toYaml .Values.securityContext | nindent 12 }}
        image: "{{ .Values.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.image.tag | default .Chart.AppVersion }}"
        imagePullPolicy: {{ .Values.image.pullPolicy }}
        ports:
        - name: http
          containerPort: {{ .Values.service.targetPort }}
          protocol: TCP
        - name: metrics
          containerPort: {{ .Values.service.metricsPort }}
          protocol: TCP
        envFrom:
        - configMapRef:
            name: {{ include "remnawave.fullname" . }}
        - secretRef:
            name: {{ include "remnawave.fullname" . }}
        {{- if .Values.livenessProbe }}
        livenessProbe:
          {{- toYaml .Values.livenessProbe | nindent 12 }}
        {{- end }}
        {{- if .Values.readinessProbe }}
        readinessProbe:
          {{- toYaml .Values.readinessProbe | nindent 12 }}
        {{- end }}
        resources:
          {{- toYaml .Values.resources | nindent 12 }}
      {{- with .Values.nodeSelector }}
      nodeSelector:
        {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
      {{- end }}
      {{- with .Values.affinity }}
      affinity:
        {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
      {{- end }}
      {{- with .Values.tolerations }}
      tolerations:
        {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
      {{- end }}
</file>

<file path="kubernetes/charts/remnawave/templates/ingress.yaml">
{{- if .Values.ingress.enabled -}}
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: {{ include "remnawave.fullname" . }}
  labels:
    {{- include "remnawave.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
  annotations:
    {{- if .Values.ingress.tls }}
    cert-manager.io/cluster-issuer: {{ .Values.ingress.tls.clusterIssuer | default "letsencrypt" | quote }}
    {{- end }}
    traefik.ingress.kubernetes.io/router.entrypoints: web,websecure
    {{- if .Values.authentik.enabled }}
    traefik.ingress.kubernetes.io/router.middlewares: {{ .Values.authentik.middleware | default "service-authentik-forward-auth@kubernetescrd" }}
    {{- end }}
    {{- with .Values.ingress.annotations }}
    {{- toYaml . | nindent 4 }}
    {{- end }}
spec:
  {{- if .Values.ingress.className }}
  ingressClassName: {{ .Values.ingress.className }}
  {{- end }}
  {{- if .Values.ingress.tls }}
  tls:
    {{- range .Values.ingress.tls }}
    - hosts:
        {{- range .hosts }}
        - {{ . | quote }}
        {{- end }}
      secretName: {{ .secretName }}
    {{- end }}
  {{- end }}
  rules:
    {{- range .Values.ingress.hosts }}
    - host: {{ .host | quote }}
      http:
        paths:
          {{- range .paths }}
          - path: {{ .path }}
            pathType: {{ .pathType }}
            backend:
              service:
                name: {{ include "remnawave.fullname" $ }}
                port:
                  number: {{ $.Values.service.port }}
          {{- end }}
    {{- end }}
{{- end }}
</file>

<file path="kubernetes/charts/remnawave/templates/service.yaml">
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: {{ include "remnawave.fullname" . }}
  labels:
    {{- include "remnawave.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
  {{- if .Values.consul.enabled }}
  annotations:
    consul.hashicorp.com/service-name: {{ include "remnawave.fullname" . }}
    consul.hashicorp.com/service-port: "{{ .Values.service.port }}"
    consul.hashicorp.com/service-tags: "{{ join "," .Values.consul.tags }}"
  {{- end }}
spec:
  type: {{ .Values.service.type }}
  ports:
    - port: {{ .Values.service.port }}
      targetPort: http
      protocol: TCP
      name: http
    - port: {{ .Values.service.metricsPort }}
      targetPort: metrics
      protocol: TCP
      name: metrics
  selector:
    {{- include "remnawave.selectorLabels" . | nindent 4 }}
</file>

<file path="kubernetes/charts/rybbit/templates/api/deployment.yaml">
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{ .Release.Name }}-backend
  namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
  labels:
    {{- include "rybbit.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: backend
  annotations:
    rollme: {{ .Values.backend.resources | toJson | sha256sum }}
spec:
  replicas: {{ .Values.backend.replicaCount }}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      {{- include "rybbit.selectorLabels" . | nindent 6 }}
      app.kubernetes.io/component: backend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        {{- include "rybbit.selectorLabels" . | nindent 8 }}
        app.kubernetes.io/component: backend
    spec:
      {{- with .Values.global.imagePullSecrets }}
      imagePullSecrets:
        {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
      {{- end }}
      securityContext:
        {{- with .Values.global.podSecurityContext }}
        {{- if .enabled }}
        fsGroup: {{ .fsGroup }}
        {{- end }}
        {{- end }}
      initContainers:
        - name: wait-for-clickhouse
          image: busybox:1.35
          command:
            - sh
            - -c
            - |
              echo "Waiting for ClickHouse to be ready..."
              {{- if .Values.clickhouse.enabled }}
              until wget -q --spider http://{{ .Release.Name }}-clickhouse.{{ .Release.Namespace }}.svc.cluster.local:8123/ping; do
              {{- else }}
              CLICKHOUSE_HOST="${CLICKHOUSE_HOST:-clickhouse.db.svc.cluster.local}"
              until wget -q --spider http://${CLICKHOUSE_HOST}:8123/ping; do
              {{- end }}
                echo "ClickHouse is not ready yet..."
                sleep 2
              done
              echo "ClickHouse is ready!"
          {{- if not .Values.clickhouse.enabled }}
          env:
            - name: CLICKHOUSE_HOST
              value: {{ .Values.backend.env.CLICKHOUSE_HOST | default "clickhouse.db.svc.cluster.local" | quote }}
          {{- end }}
        - name: wait-for-postgres
          image: postgres:15-alpine
          command:
            - sh
            - -c
            - |
              echo "Waiting for PostgreSQL to be ready..."
              {{- if .Values.postgresql.enabled }}
              until pg_isready -h {{ .Release.Name }}-postgresql.{{ .Release.Namespace }}.svc.cluster.local -p {{ .Values.postgresql.primary.service.ports.postgresql }}; do
              {{- else }}
              POSTGRES_HOST="${POSTGRES_HOST:-postgresql.db.svc.cluster.local}"
              POSTGRES_PORT="${POSTGRES_PORT:-5432}"
              until pg_isready -h ${POSTGRES_HOST} -p ${POSTGRES_PORT}; do
              {{- end }}
                echo "PostgreSQL is not ready yet..."
                sleep 2
              done
              echo "PostgreSQL is ready!"
          {{- if not .Values.postgresql.enabled }}
          env:
            - name: POSTGRES_HOST
              value: {{ .Values.backend.env.POSTGRES_HOST | default "postgresql.db.svc.cluster.local" | quote }}
            - name: POSTGRES_PORT
              value: {{ .Values.backend.env.POSTGRES_PORT | default "5432" | quote }}
          {{- end }}
      {{- with .Values.global.podAntiAffinity }}
      affinity:
        podAntiAffinity:
          {{- if eq . "hard" }}
          requiredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
            - labelSelector:
                matchLabels:
                  app.kubernetes.io/component: backend
              topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
          {{- else }}
          preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
            - weight: 100
              podAffinityTerm:
                labelSelector:
                  matchLabels:
                    app.kubernetes.io/component: backend
                topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
          {{- end }}
      {{- end }}
      containers:
        - name: backend
          image: "{{ .Values.backend.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.backend.image.tag }}"
          imagePullPolicy: {{ .Values.backend.image.pullPolicy }}
          securityContext:
            {{- with .Values.global.containerSecurityContext }}
            {{- if .enabled }}
            runAsUser: 1001
            runAsNonRoot: true
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: {{ .allowPrivilegeEscalation }}
            {{- end }}
            {{- end }}
          resources:
            {{- toYaml .Values.backend.resources | nindent 12 }}
          env:
            {{- /* Add user-provided environment variables first */ -}}
            {{- range $key, $value := .Values.backend.env }}
            - name: {{ $key }}
              value: {{ $value | quote }}
            {{- end }}
            {{- /* Add default database configuration only if not provided by user */ -}}
            {{- if not (hasKey .Values.backend.env "CLICKHOUSE_HOST") }}
            - name: CLICKHOUSE_HOST
              {{- if .Values.clickhouse.enabled }}
              value: {{ printf "http://%s-clickhouse.%s.svc.cluster.local:8123" .Release.Name .Release.Namespace | quote }}
              {{- else }}
              value: "http://clickhouse.db.svc.cluster.local:8123"
              {{- end }}
            {{- end }}
            {{- if not (hasKey .Values.backend.env "CLICKHOUSE_USER") }}
            - name: CLICKHOUSE_USER
              value: {{ .Values.clickhouse.auth.username | default "default" | quote }}
            {{- end }}
            {{- if not (hasKey .Values.backend.env "POSTGRES_HOST") }}
            - name: POSTGRES_HOST
              {{- if .Values.postgresql.enabled }}
              value: {{ .Release.Name }}-postgresql.{{ .Release.Namespace }}.svc.cluster.local
              {{- else }}
              value: postgresql.db.svc.cluster.local
              {{- end }}
            {{- end }}
            {{- if not (hasKey .Values.backend.env "POSTGRES_PORT") }}
            - name: POSTGRES_PORT
              {{- if .Values.postgresql.enabled }}
              value: {{ .Values.postgresql.primary.service.ports.postgresql | quote }}
              {{- else }}
              value: "5432"
              {{- end }}
            {{- end }}
            {{- if not (hasKey .Values.backend.env "POSTGRES_DB") }}
            - name: POSTGRES_DB
              value: {{ .Values.postgresql.auth.database | default "analytics" | quote }}
            {{- end }}
            {{- if not (hasKey .Values.backend.env "POSTGRES_USER") }}
            - name: POSTGRES_USER
              value: {{ .Values.postgresql.auth.username | default "postgres" | quote }}
            {{- end }}
            {{- /* Add secrets for database passwords */ -}}
            {{- if not (hasKey .Values.backend.env "POSTGRES_PASSWORD") }}
            - name: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  {{- if .Values.postgresql.enabled }}
                  name: {{ .Values.postgresql.auth.existingSecret | default (printf "%s-postgresql" .Release.Name) }}
                  key: {{ .Values.postgresql.auth.secretKeys.adminPasswordKey | default "postgres-password" }}
                  {{- else }}
                  {{- if .Values.postgresql.auth.existingSecret }}
                  name: {{ .Values.postgresql.auth.existingSecret }}
                  key: {{ .Values.postgresql.auth.secretKeys.adminPasswordKey | default "password" }}
                  {{- else }}
                  name: postgres-secret
                  key: postgres-password
                  {{- end }}
                  {{- end }}
            {{- end }}
            {{- if not (hasKey .Values.backend.env "CLICKHOUSE_PASSWORD") }}
            - name: CLICKHOUSE_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  {{- if .Values.clickhouse.enabled }}
                  {{- if .Values.clickhouse.auth.existingSecret }}
                  name: {{ .Values.clickhouse.auth.existingSecret }}
                  key: {{ .Values.clickhouse.auth.existingSecretKey | default "clickhouse-password" }}
                  {{- else }}
                  name: {{ .Release.Name }}-clickhouse
                  key: admin-password
                  {{- end }}
                  {{- else }}
                  {{- if .Values.clickhouse.auth.existingSecret }}
                  name: {{ .Values.clickhouse.auth.existingSecret }}
                  key: {{ .Values.clickhouse.auth.existingSecretKey | default "clickhouse-password" }}
                  {{- else }}
                  name: clickhouse-secret
                  key: admin-password
                  {{- end }}
                  {{- end }}
            {{- end }}
            {{- /* Add auth secret only if not provided by user */ -}}
            {{- if not (hasKey .Values.backend.env "BETTER_AUTH_SECRET") }}
            {{- if .Values.backend.betterSecret.secretName }}
            - name: BETTER_AUTH_SECRET
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: {{ .Values.backend.betterSecret.secretName }}
                  key: {{ .Values.backend.betterSecret.authKey }}
            {{- else }}
            - name: BETTER_AUTH_SECRET
              value: {{ randAlphaNum 32 | quote }}
            {{- end }}
            {{- end }}
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: {{ .Values.backend.service.port }}
              protocol: TCP
          {{- with .Values.backend.livenessProbe }}
          {{- if .enabled }}
          livenessProbe:
            {{- omit . "enabled" | toYaml | nindent 12 }}
          {{- end }}
          {{- end }}
          {{- with .Values.backend.readinessProbe }}
          {{- if .enabled }}
          readinessProbe:
            {{- omit . "enabled" | toYaml | nindent 12 }}
          {{- end }}
          {{- end }}
          {{- with .Values.backend.startupProbe }}
          {{- if .enabled }}
          startupProbe:
            {{- omit . "enabled" | toYaml | nindent 12 }}
          {{- end }}
          {{- end }}
</file>

apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod

<file path="kubernetes/charts/rybbit/templates/_helpers.tpl">
{{/*
Expand the name of the chart.
*/}}
{{- define "rybbit.name" -}}
{{- with .Chart }}
  {{- with .Name }}
    {{- . | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
  {{- else }}
    rybbit
  {{- end }}
{{- else }}
  rybbit
{{- end }}
{{- end }}

{{/*
Create a default fully qualified app name.
We truncate at 63 chars because some Kubernetes name fields are limited to this (by the DNS naming spec).
If release name contains chart name it will be used as a full name.
*/}}
{{- define "rybbit.fullname" -}}
{{- if .Values.fullnameOverride }}
{{- .Values.fullnameOverride | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
{{- else }}
{{- $name := default "rybbit" .Chart.Name | default .Values.nameOverride }}
{{- if contains $name .Release.Name }}
{{- .Release.Name | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
{{- else }}
{{- printf "%s-%s" .Release.Name $name | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}

{{/*
Create chart name and version as used by the chart label.
*/}}
{{- define "rybbit.chart" -}}
{{- printf "%s-%s" (default "rybbit" .Chart.Name) (default "0.1.0" .Chart.Version) | replace "+" "_" | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
{{- end }}

{{/*
Common labels
*/}}
{{- define "rybbit.labels" -}}
helm.sh/chart: {{ include "rybbit.chart" $ }}
{{ include "rybbit.selectorLabels" $ }}
{{- if .Chart.AppVersion }}
app.kubernetes.io/version: {{ .Chart.AppVersion | quote }}
{{- end }}
app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: {{ .Release.Service }}
app.kubernetes.io/part-of: {{ include "rybbit.name" $ }}
release: {{ .Release.Name }}
{{- end }}

{{/*
Selector labels
*/}}
{{- define "rybbit.selectorLabels" -}}
app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ include "rybbit.name" $ }}
app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ .Release.Name }}
{{- end }}

{{/*
Generate random password
*/}}
{{- define "rybbit.randomPassword" -}}
{{- $password := randAlphaNum 32 -}}
{{- $password -}}
{{- end -}}

{{/*
Generate random string
*/}}
{{- define "rybbit.randomString" -}}
{{- $string := randAlphaNum 16 -}}
{{- $string -}}
{{- end -}}

{{/*
Create the name of the service account to use
*/}}
{{- define "rybbit.serviceAccountName" -}}
{{- if .Values.serviceAccount.create }}
{{- default (include "rybbit.fullname" .) .Values.serviceAccount.name }}
{{- else }}
{{- default "default" .Values.serviceAccount.name }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}
</file>

<file path="kubernetes/charts/stalwart/templates/pvc.yaml">
# Data PVC
apiVersion: v1
kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
metadata:
  name: stalwart-data
  namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
spec:
  accessModes:
    - {{ .Values.persistence.data.accessMode }}
  storageClassName: {{ .Values.persistence.storageClass }}
  resources:
    requests:
      storage: {{ .Values.persistence.data.size }}

---
# Config PVC
apiVersion: v1
kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
metadata:
  name: stalwart-config
  namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
spec:
  accessModes:
    - {{ .Values.persistence.config.accessMode }}
  storageClassName: {{ .Values.persistence.storageClass }}
  resources:
    requests:
      storage: {{ .Values.persistence.config.size }}
</file>

<file path="kubernetes/charts/stalwart/templates/rbac.yaml">
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: stalwart
  namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}

---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRole
metadata:
  name: stalwart
rules:
  - apiGroups: [""]
    resources: ["pods"]
    verbs: ["get", "list"]
  - apiGroups: [""]
    resources: ["secrets"]
    verbs: ["get", "list"]

---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRoleBinding
metadata:
  name: stalwart
roleRef:
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
  kind: ClusterRole
  name: stalwart
subjects:
  - kind: ServiceAccount
    name: stalwart
    namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
</file>

<file path="kubernetes/charts/stalwart/templates/secret.yaml">
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: stalwart-secrets
  namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
type: Opaque
stringData:
  # Domain configuration
  STALWART_HOSTNAME: {{ .Values.stalwart.config.domain }}

  # LDAP для Authentik
  LDAP_HOST: {{ .Values.ldap.host }}
  LDAP_PORT: "{{ .Values.ldap.port }}"
  LDAP_BIND_DN: {{ .Values.ldap.bindDN }}
  LDAP_BIND_PASSWORD: {{ .Values.ldap.bindPassword }}
  LDAP_BASE_DN: {{ .Values.ldap.baseDN }}
  LDAP_AUTH_METHOD: {{ .Values.ldap.authMethod }}

  {{- if .Values.postgresql.enabled }}
  # PostgreSQL
  DATABASE_URL: "postgresql://{{ .Values.postgresql.username }}:{{ .Values.postgresql.password }}@{{ .Values.postgresql.host }}:{{ .Values.postgresql.port }}/{{ .Values.postgresql.database }}"
  {{- end }}

  {{- if .Values.redis.enabled }}
  # Redis
  REDIS_URL: "redis://{{ if .Values.redis.password }}:{{ .Values.redis.password }}@{{ end }}{{ .Values.redis.host }}:{{ .Values.redis.port }}/0"
  {{- end }}
</file>

<file path="kubernetes/charts/stalwart/README.md">
# Stalwart mailer

[Guide](https://stalw.art/docs/cluster/orchestration/kubernetes)

Manual installation

```bash
helm install stalwart charts/stalwart -n code --create-namespace -f values.yaml
```

### Connect to authentik

Enable LDAP in authentik

```bash
# LDAP on port 389 (Authentik LDAP interface)
# URL: ldap://authentik-ldap.authentik.svc.cluster.local:389
# Base DN: ou=users,dc=authentik,dc=local
# Bind DN: cn=admin,dc=authentik,dc=local
# Bind Password: (password of LDAP)
```

Create Authentik user

```bash
# WebUI Authentik:
# Admin Panel → Users & Groups → Users
# Create user with email for Stalwart
```
</file>

<file path="kubernetes/charts/stoat/templates/api/deployment.yaml">
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: "{{ include "revolt.fullname" . }}-api"
  namespace: {{ .Values.global.namespace }}
  labels:
    {{- include "revolt.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
    revolt-app: {{ include "revolt.fullname" . }}-api
spec:
  replicas: {{ .Values.api.replicaCount }}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      {{- include "revolt.selectorLabels" . | nindent 6 }}
      revolt-app: {{ include "revolt.fullname" . }}-api
  template:
    metadata:
      {{- with .Values.api.annotations }}
      annotations:
        {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
      {{- end }}
      labels:
        revolt-app: {{ include "revolt.fullname" . }}-api
        {{- include "revolt.labels" . | nindent 8 }}
        {{- with .Values.api.labels }}
        {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
        {{- end }}
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: api
          image: "{{ .Values.api.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.api.image.tag }}"
          imagePullPolicy: {{ .Values.api.image.pullPolicy }}
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 14702
              protocol: TCP
          livenessProbe:
            {{- if .Values.api.livenessProbe }}
            {{- toYaml .Values.api.livenessProbe | nindent 12 }}
            {{- else }}
            tcpSocket:
              port: {{ .Values.global.api.port }}
            initialDelaySeconds: 45
            periodSeconds: 30
            {{- end }}
          readinessProbe:
            {{- if .Values.api.readinessProbe }}
            {{- toYaml .Values.api.readinessProbe | nindent 12 }}
            {{- else }}
            tcpSocket:
              port: {{ .Values.global.api.port }}
            initialDelaySeconds: 45
            periodSeconds: 30
            {{- end }}
          {{- with .Values.api.resources }}
          resources:
            {{- toYaml . | nindent 12 }}
          {{- end }}
          volumeMounts:
            - name: config
              subPath: Revolt.toml
              mountPath: {{ .Values.api.configMountPath }}
            {{- with .Values.api.extra_volumeMounts }}
            {{ toYaml . | nindent 12 }}
            {{- end }}
      volumes:
        - name: config
          configMap:
            name: {{ include "revolt.fullname" . }}-config
        {{- with .Values.api.extra_volumes }}
        {{ toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
        {{- end }}
      {{- with .Values.api.nodeSelector }}
      nodeSelector:
        {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
      {{- end }}
      {{- with .Values.api.affinity }}
      affinity:
        {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
      {{- end }}
      {{- with .Values.api.tolerations }}
      tolerations:
        {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
      {{- end }}
</file>

<file path="kubernetes/charts/stoat/templates/january/service.yaml">
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: {{ include "revolt.fullname" . }}-january
  namespace: {{ .Values.global.namespace }}
  labels:
    {{- include "revolt.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
    revolt-app: {{ include "revolt.fullname" . }}-january
  {{- if .Values.consul.enabled }}
  annotations:
    consul.hashicorp.com/service-name: "stoat-january"
    consul.hashicorp.com/service-port: {{ .Values.global.january.port | quote }}
    consul.hashicorp.com/service-tags: {{ .Values.consul.tags | join "," | quote }}
  {{- end }}
spec:
  type: {{ .Values.january.service.type }}
  ports:
    - name: http
      targetPort: http
      protocol: TCP
      port: {{ .Values.global.january.port }}
  selector:
    {{- include "revolt.selectorLabels" . | nindent 4 }}
    revolt-app: {{ include "revolt.fullname" . }}-january
</file>

  {{- end }}

<file path="kubernetes/charts/stoat/generate_config.sh">
#!/usr/bin/env sh

openssl ecparam -name prime256v1 -genkey -noout -out vapid_private.pem

PRIVATE_KEY=$(base64 vapid_private.pem | tr -d '\n' | tr -d '=')
PUBLIC_KEY=$(openssl ec -in vapid_private.pem -outform DER | tail -c 65 | base64 | tr '/+' '_-' | tr -d '\n' | tr -d '=')

rm vapid_private.pem

ENCRYPTION_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 32)

echo "VAPID private_key:   $PRIVATE_KEY"
echo "VAPID public_key :   $PUBLIC_KEY"
echo "File encryption_key: $ENCRYPTION_KEY"
</file>

<file path="kubernetes/charts/syncthing/templates/rbac.yaml">
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: syncthing
  namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}

---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRole
metadata:
  name: syncthing
rules:
  - apiGroups: [""]
    resources: ["pods"]
    verbs: ["get", "list"]
  - apiGroups: [""]
    resources: ["configmaps"]
    verbs: ["get", "list"]

---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRoleBinding
metadata:
  name: syncthing
roleRef:
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
  kind: ClusterRole
  name: syncthing
subjects:
  - kind: ServiceAccount
    name: syncthing
    namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
</file>

<file path="kubernetes/charts/vault/templates/rbac.yaml">
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: vault
  namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}

---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRole
metadata:
  name: vault
rules:
  - apiGroups: [""]
    resources: ["pods"]
    verbs: ["get", "list", "watch"]
  - apiGroups: [""]
    resources: ["serviceaccounts"]
    verbs: ["get"]
  - apiGroups: [""]
    resources: ["configmaps"]
    verbs: ["get", "list"]
  - apiGroups: [""]
    resources: ["secrets"]
    verbs: ["get", "list"]

---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRoleBinding
metadata:
  name: vault
roleRef:
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
  kind: ClusterRole
  name: vault
subjects:
  - kind: ServiceAccount
    name: vault
    namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}

---
# Vault Agent Injector RBAC
{{- if .Values.injector.enabled }}
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: vault-agent-injector
  namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}

---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRole
metadata:
  name: vault-agent-injector
rules:
  - apiGroups: [""]
    resources: ["configmaps", "secrets"]
    verbs: ["get", "list", "watch"]
  - apiGroups: [""]
    resources: ["serviceaccounts"]
    verbs: ["get"]
  - apiGroups: ["admissionregistration.k8s.io"]
    resources: ["mutatingwebhookconfigurations"]
    verbs: ["get", "list", "watch", "create", "update", "patch", "delete"]

---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRoleBinding
metadata:
  name: vault-agent-injector
roleRef:
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
  kind: ClusterRole
  name: vault-agent-injector
subjects:
  - kind: ServiceAccount
    name: vault-agent-injector
    namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
{{- end }}
</file>

  MAIL_SECURITY: "starttls"

  MAIL_PASSWORD: {{ .Values.vaultwarden.config.email.password }}
  {{- end }}

<file path="kubernetes/charts/vert/templates/_helpers.tpl">
{{/*
Expand the name of the chart.
*/}}
{{- define "vert.name" -}}
{{- default .Chart.Name .Values.nameOverride | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
{{- end }}

{{/*
Create a default fully qualified app name.
*/}}
{{- define "vert.fullname" -}}
{{- if .Values.fullnameOverride }}
{{- .Values.fullnameOverride | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
{{- else }}
{{- $name := default .Chart.Name .Values.nameOverride }}
{{- if contains $name .Release.Name }}
{{- .Release.Name | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
{{- else }}
{{- printf "%s-%s" .Release.Name $name | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}

{{/*
Create chart name and version as used by the chart label.
*/}}
{{- define "vert.chart" -}}
{{- printf "%s-%s" .Chart.Name .Chart.Version | replace "+" "_" | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
{{- end }}

{{/*
Common labels
*/}}
{{- define "vert.labels" -}}
helm.sh/chart: {{ include "vert.chart" . }}
{{ include "vert.selectorLabels" . }}
{{- if .Chart.AppVersion }}
app.kubernetes.io/version: {{ .Chart.AppVersion | quote }}
{{- end }}
app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: {{ .Release.Service }}
{{- end }}

{{/*
Selector labels
*/}}
{{- define "vert.selectorLabels" -}}
app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ include "vert.name" . }}
app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ .Release.Name }}
{{- end }}

{{/*
Create the name of the service account to use
*/}}
{{- define "vert.serviceAccountName" -}}
{{- if .Values.serviceAccount.create }}
{{- default (include "vert.fullname" .) .Values.serviceAccount.name }}
{{- else }}
{{- default "default" .Values.serviceAccount.name }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}
</file>

<file path="kubernetes/charts/vert/templates/ingress.yaml">
{{- if .Values.ingress.enabled }}
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: {{ include "vert.fullname" . }}
  namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
  labels:
    {{- include "vert.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
  annotations:
    {{- if .Values.ingress.tls.enabled }}
    cert-manager.io/cluster-issuer: {{ .Values.ingress.tls.clusterIssuer | default "letsencrypt" | quote }}
    {{- end }}
    traefik.ingress.kubernetes.io/router.entrypoints: web,websecure
    {{- if .Values.authentik.enabled }}
    traefik.ingress.kubernetes.io/router.middlewares: {{ .Values.authentik.middleware | default "service-authentik-forward-auth@kubernetescrd" }}
    {{- end }}
    {{- with .Values.ingress.annotations }}
    {{- toYaml . | nindent 4 }}
    {{- end }}
spec:
  ingressClassName: {{ .Values.ingress.className }}
  rules:
    - host: {{ .Values.ingress.host }}
      http:
        paths:
          - path: /
            pathType: Prefix
            backend:
              service:
                name: {{ include "vert.fullname" . }}
                port:
                  number: {{ .Values.service.port }}
  {{- if .Values.ingress.tls.enabled }}
  tls:
    - hosts:
        - {{ .Values.ingress.host }}
      secretName: {{ .Values.ingress.tls.secretName }}
  {{- end }}
{{- end }}
</file>

<file path="kubernetes/charts/vert/templates/networkpolicy.yaml">
{{- if .Values.networkPolicy.enabled -}}
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: {{ include "vert.fullname" . }}
  labels:
    {{- include "vert.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      {{- include "vert.selectorLabels" . | nindent 6 }}
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress

  ingress:
    # Allow ingress from Traefik
    - from:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              name: ingress
          podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/name: traefik
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: {{ .Values.service.port }}

    # Allow ingress from same namespace
    - from:
        - podSelector: {}

    {{- with .Values.networkPolicy.ingress }}
    {{- toYaml . | nindent 4 }}
    {{- end }}

  egress:
    # Allow DNS
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              name: kube-system
      ports:
        - protocol: UDP
          port: 53

    # Allow HTTPS to external
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector: {}
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 443

    # Allow HTTP to external
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector: {}
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 80

    # Allow database connections
    {{- if .Values.networkPolicy.egressRules.allowDatabases }}
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              name: db
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 5432  # PostgreSQL
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 27017  # MongoDB
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 6379  # Valkey/Redis
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 9000  # MinIO
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8123  # ClickHouse
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 3306  # MySQL
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 5672  # RabbitMQ
    {{- end }}

    # Allow service mesh (Consul)
    {{- if .Values.networkPolicy.egressRules.allowConsul }}
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              name: service
          podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/name: consul
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8500
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8600
    {{- end }}

    # Allow Vault
    {{- if .Values.networkPolicy.egressRules.allowVault }}
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              name: service
          podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/name: vault
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8200
    {{- end }}

    # Allow Authentik
    {{- if .Values.networkPolicy.egressRules.allowAuthentik }}
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              name: service
          podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/name: authentik
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 9000
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 9443
    {{- end }}

    {{- with .Values.networkPolicy.egress }}
    {{- toYaml . | nindent 4 }}
    {{- end }}
{{- end }}
</file>

<file path="kubernetes/charts/youtrack/templates/configmap.yaml">
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: youtrack-config
  namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
data:
  # Конфигурация Hub интеграции
  hub-config.properties: |
    hub.enabled={{ .Values.hub.enabled }}
    hub.host={{ .Values.hub.host }}
    hub.port={{ .Values.hub.port }}
    hub.sso.enabled={{ .Values.authentik.hubIntegration }}

  # Конфигурация GitLab интеграции
  gitlab-config.properties: |
    gitlab.enabled={{ .Values.gitlab.enabled }}
    gitlab.host={{ .Values.gitlab.host }}
    gitlab.port={{ .Values.gitlab.port }}
    gitlab.cicd.enabled={{ .Values.gitlab.integration.cicd }}
    gitlab.webhooks.enabled={{ .Values.gitlab.integration.webhooks }}
    gitlab.ssl=false

  # Authentik SAML configuration
  saml-config.properties: |
    saml.enabled=true
    saml.idp.sso.url=http://{{ .Values.hub.host }}:{{ .Values.hub.port }}/saml/sso
    saml.idp.entity.id=hub
    saml.sp.entity.id=youtrack
    saml.sp.acs.url=http://{{ .Values.youtrack.config.baseUrl }}/saml/acs
</file>

kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: youtrack
  namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}

---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRole
metadata:
  name: youtrack
rules:
  - apiGroups: [""]
    resources: ["pods"]
    verbs: ["get", "list", "watch"]
  - apiGroups: [""]
    resources: ["configmaps"]
    verbs: ["get", "list"]

---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRoleBinding
metadata:
  name: youtrack
roleRef:
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
  kind: ClusterRole
  name: youtrack
subjects:
  - kind: ServiceAccount
    name: youtrack
    namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
